title: kengyilia laxistachya
intro: Kengyilia laxistachya, also known as the Tibetan fescue or Chinese fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is rich in saponins, which have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Kengyilia laxistachya include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used to make herbal teas and infusions.
